"selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": false, "children": [{"text": "Trenìt! presents a “buy ticket” button on the “Prices” screen in the trip details, in case the online purchase is available. By clicking on this button, it is possible to buy the train ticket very easily, redirected to the train company’s official website.

N.B. Trenìt! doesn’t store any password or ticket receipt and is not involved in the transactions.
